requirements.description: Frontend configures VITE_API_BASE_URL, VITE_AZURE_TENANT_ID, VITE_AZURE_CLIENT_ID, VITE_AZURE_SCOPES, VITE_USE_MOCK_DATA via .env.
requirements.evidence: VITE_ env vars in config/env modules

requirements.description: Frontend API call logging controlled by VITE_LOG_API_CALLS env var (disabled in production).
requirements.evidence: VITE_ env vars in config/env modules; apiLogger modules in frontend

requirements.description: JWT authentication: access token 1h lifetime, refresh 7 days sliding, Redis distributed session with invalidation on logout.
requirements.evidence: JWT/token service and auth handler files

requirements.description: Rate limiting: 100 requests/min per user, 1000 requests/min per tenant.
requirements.evidence: Rate limiting middleware and extensions

requirements.description: Security monitoring: failed login >5/5min triggers alert+lock; any cross-tenant attempt triggers alert+block.
requirements.evidence: SecurityMonitoringService/Middleware

requirements.description: Testing: unit tests >70% (xUnit/Vitest), integration tests >50%, E2E Playwright for critical paths, WCAG 2.2 AA axe-core accessibility.
requirements.evidence: Test files: unit tests, a11y tests, E2E specs

requirements.description: Monitoring SLAs: Council deliberation P95 alert >15s, critical >30s; circuit breaker open alert; council token cost alert >$0.05/$0.10 avg per session.
requirements.evidence: Council orchestration, consensus, deliberation services; CouncilMetricsService, monitoring, SLA thresholds; CostCalculationService, LlmUsageLogger

requirements.description: SQL database backup continuous retention 35 days; blob storage backup daily retention 30 days; RTO <4h region failure, RPO <1h.
requirements.evidence: Retention service, background job, repository; BackupHealthCheck, BlobBackupHealthCheck

requirements.description: GDPR controls: data portability (export), right to erasure (delete account flow), consent management, DPA with sub-processors.
requirements.evidence: GDPR service, consent controller/service

requirements.description: 4-level data classification enforced: Restricted (PII, chats) TDE+TenantId isolation; Confidential (API keys) Azure Key Vault AES-256; Internal (metrics); Public (docs).
requirements.evidence: DataClassification middleware and policy; KeyVaultService, secret management; ChatService SSE streaming implementation; PII pseudonymization, anonymization, PHI detector

requirements.description: All LLM provider API keys, connector credentials, N8N API keys, and vector store credentials stored exclusively in Azure Key Vault.
requirements.evidence: KeyVaultService, secret management; Workflow/N8N controllers, services, pages; VectorStore service, repository, controller; Connector service and controller; LLM orchestration, provider factory, specific providers

requirements.description: Data retention enforced: chats 90d configurable, files 90d configurable, audit 1yr fixed, billing 7yr fixed, user profiles Active+30d fixed.
requirements.evidence: Retention service, background job, repository; Billing/subscription/payment services and controllers; User service, settings page
